CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Continued To Feb-19-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-05-2013 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT RT WESTERN MAINTENANCE, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled. The Request for Judicial Notice is denied. Defendant asks the Court to take judicial notice of the "documents attached" as Exhibits A, B, and C to the request for judicial notice. A court may not take judicial notice of the contents of documents in a court or agency file. (Arce v. Kaiser Foundation Health Plan, Inc. (2010) 181 Cal. App. 4th 471, 482.) As to Exhibit C, it is unauthenticated and appears to be a letter or notice. In any event, even if the Court were to take judicial notice of Exhibit A, it merely establishes that a worker's compensation claim was filed on a certain date. This is an insufficient basis to sustain the demurrer, in light of the allegations in the Complaint. Further, Defendant's reply brief raises, for the first time, a new argument regarding the application of 33 U.S.C. 904 and 905(a) which will be not be considered as grounds for demurrer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM
